studies.title:
Use of a training-based smartphone application (Orthopy App) for patients with
rotator cuff-related disorders in comparison to usual care – a randomized,
controlled, multicenter study

_verification.reason: The study is about the 'Orthopy App' for shoulder complaints, not 'Orthopy bei Knieverletzungen'. The indication and context differ, focusing on rotator cuff-related disorders rather than knee injuries.
